text:
EXPLANATION: The paper is real and confirmed on both OpenReview (NeurIPS 2025 LLM Evaluation Workshop) and the NeurIPS virtual program, with all cited authors matching exactly. The cited title "Haystack Engineering: Context Engineering Meets the Long-Context Challenge in Large Language Models" corresponds to the workshop version, while the arXiv/extended version carries a slightly different subtitle ("...for Heterogeneous and Agentic Long-Context Evaluation") — both are genuine versions of the same work by the same authors.
LINK: https://openreview.net/forum?id=wON1mDtXG1
FOUND_TITLE: Haystack Engineering: Context Engineering Meets the Long-Context Challenge in Large Language Models
FOUND_AUTHORS: Mufei Li, Dongqi Fu, Limei Wang, Si Zhang, Hanqing Zeng, Kaan Sancak, Ruizhong Qiu, Haoyu Wang, Xiaoxin He, Xavier Bresson, Yinglong Xia, Chonglin Sun, Pan Li
FOUND_YEAR: 2025
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
